message:
🐛 Fix main build - add missing Reload method and GitOps handlers (#16)

- Add Reload() method to KubectlProxy to reload kubeconfig from disk
- Add GitOpsHandlers stub with DetectDrift and Sync methods

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
